title: Perform laboratory-based ecological techniques
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Perform laboratory-based ecological techniques demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria.

elements.title: Process specimens and documentation

pcs.text: Identify specimens and request forms that do not comply with minimum industry requirements for labelling, identification and test requests
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify specimens and request forms that do not comply with minimum industry requirements for labelling, identification and test requests?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify specimens and request forms that do not comply with minimum industry requirements for labelling, identification and test requests.

pcs.text: Record any discrepancies and indicate what action is required
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Record any discrepancies and indicate what action is required?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Record any discrepancies and indicate what action is required.

pcs.text: Log samples, recording details that allow accurate tracking and chain of custody
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Log samples, recording details that allow accurate tracking and chain of custody?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Log samples, recording details that allow accurate tracking and chain of custody.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Process specimens and documentation

elements.title: Participate in the identification and classification of species

pcs.text: Record macroscopic and/or microscopic details of specimens to assist in their identification and classification
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Record macroscopic and/or microscopic details of specimens to assist in their identification and classification?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Record macroscopic and/or microscopic details of specimens to assist in their identification and classification.

pcs.text: Use taxonomic keys to assist in the identification and classification of species
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Use taxonomic keys to assist in the identification and classification of species?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Use taxonomic keys to assist in the identification and classification of species.

pcs.text: Perform laboratory analyses that can assist in identification and classification of species

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Perform laboratory analyses that can assist in identification and classification of species.

pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Preserve specimens for future reference?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Preserve specimens for future reference.

pcs.text: Label preserved specimens for storage and reliable retrieval from collections
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Label preserved specimens for storage and reliable retrieval from collections?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Label preserved specimens for storage and reliable retrieval from collections.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Participate in the identification and classification of species

elements.title: Maintain viability and integrity of specimens during experimentation

pcs.text: Provide nutrients and environments to maintain viability of individual specimens and organisms being cultured or propagated

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Provide nutrients and environments to maintain viability of individual specimens and organisms being cultured or propagated.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Perform procedures and analyses to monitor the experimental environment.

pcs.text: Perform procedures and analyses to monitor the physiology of organisms in the experimental environment

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Perform procedures and analyses to monitor the physiology of organisms in the experimental environment.

pcs.text: Adjust nutrient requirements and environmental conditions as indicated by monitoring data

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Adjust nutrient requirements and environmental conditions as indicated by monitoring data.

pcs.text: Report (to supervisors) data and phenomena that may risk viability of individual specimens or cultures

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Report (to supervisors) data and phenomena that may risk viability of individual specimens or cultures.
